details.page_behavior: Region block page shown. No chat interface accessible. Login button available for travel access but test was for non-login.

recommendation: Meta AI is geoblocked in Korea. Cannot test APF warning template without VPN or logging in with a Meta account that has travel access. Recommend: (1) Test with login via Meta account, or (2) Skip Meta AI for Korean test environment, or (3) Use VPN to US/EU region for testing.
